/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/object_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/branch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/diff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/lock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/recovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/add.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/commit_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/diff_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/branch_cmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/checkout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/gc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abyss.dir/src/commands/recover.cpp.o -o abyss  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
